summary: Iteration 22: Verified KPI overflow bug fix (P0). CSS clamp(14px, 1.1vw, 20px) working correctly. All 6 KPI cards display without overflow at 1280px, 1440px, and 1920px. Grid uses xl:grid-cols-6 breakpoint correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KPI overflow bug fix verified. CSS uses clamp(14px, 1.1vw, 20px) for .tf-kpi-value and .tf-number-large classes. Grid uses xl:grid-cols-6 (>=1280px threshold). All pages tested without overflow issues.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: KPI values were overflowing card containers at 1440px viewport width
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: CSS clamp(14px, 1.1vw, 20px) + grid breakpoint changed from lg:grid-cols-6 to xl:grid-cols-6

verification_details.1920px: All 6 KPI cards visible, no overflow - scrollWidth equals clientWidth
verification_details.1440px: All 6 KPI cards visible, no overflow - scrollWidth equals clientWidth
verification_details.1280px: All 6 KPI cards visible, no overflow - scrollWidth equals clientWidth
